_publications._publicationTitle: Complex splicing pattern generates great diversity in human NF1 transcripts.

_contextSnippet: These data indicate that one has to be extremely careful when correlating exon skipping events to secondary structure predictions. Limitations of the mathematical model, uncertainties in the thermodynamic parameters... limit the prediction capacities
details: Showed limitations in predicting exon skipping based on secondary structure, with inconsistent results between energy states and sensitivity to window positioning
